DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_EDUCATION CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_EDUCATION (
	SUB_DISTRICT_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	NUMBER_OF_PRIMARY_SCHOOLS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_MIDDLE_SCHOOLS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_SECONDARY_SCHOOLS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_SENIOR_SECONDARY_SCHOOLS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_INDUSTRIAL_SCHOOLS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_ADULT_LITERACY_CLASS_CENTRES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_OTHER_EDUCATIONAL_FACILITIES DOUBLE PRECISION
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES (
	SUB_DISTRICT_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	NUMBER_OF_ALLOPATHIC_HOSPITALS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_ALLOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_NURSING_HOMES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_OTHER_MEDICAL_FACILITIES DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Maternity, child welfare, and primary healthcare centers
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE (
	SUB_DISTRICT_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_HOMES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_HEALTH_CENTRES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_PRIMARY_HEALTH_CENTRES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_PRIMARY_HEALTH_SUB_CENTRES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_FAMILY_WELFARE_CENTRES DOUBLE PRECISION
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_POPULATION CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_POPULATION (
	SUB_DISTRICT_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION DOUBLE PRECISION
);
